name: Aether
title: Traveler
description: A traveler from another world who had their only kin taken away, journeying through Teyvat in search of The Seven.

name: Lumine
title: Traveler
description: A traveler from another world who had their only kin taken away, journeying through Teyvat in search of The Seven.

name: Chasca
title: Voice of the Night Wind
description: A half-human, half-Saurian hunter from Natlan who rides the wind with unparalleled skill and quiet resolve.

name: Citlali
title: Ofrenda of the Night
description: An Ofrenda from Natlan who carries the blessings of the night. She weaves ice and moonlight with quiet, steadfast resolve.

name: Mavuika
title: Pyro Archon
description: The Pyro Archon and protector of the Nation of Fire. She embodies the will to burn brightly for those she loves, no matter the cost.

name: Ororon
title: Night-Wind's Mystic Voice
description: A mysterious young man from Natlan with the gift of hearing the voices of spirits, even those who have long since fallen silent.

name: Xilonen
title: Warrior of the Sun's Reign
description: A Loom-Keeper from Natlan and devoted disciple of the sun. She battles with golden geo energy and a spirit forged in fire.

name: Skirk
title: The Foul's Disciple
description: A mysterious swordswoman and Childe's master who dwells in the darkest corners of the Abyss.

name: Dahlia
title: Deacon of the Church
description: A deacon of the Church of Favonius in Mondstadt, known for his calm demeanor and dedication.

name: Ineffa
title: Data Weaver
description: Gelişmiş teknolojiyi Elektro enerjisiyle birleştiren bir mühendis. Kulaklıkları ve visorü aracılığıyla savaş alanındaki verileri gerçek zamanlı analiz eder.

name: Nefer
title: Emerald Vizier
description: A high-ranking official from the desert regions of Sumeru, using the power of flora to create lush oases in the sand.

name: Durin
title: Shadow of the Dragon
description: A human personification of the fallen dragon Durin, seeking redemption through the searing flames of rebirth.

name: Columbina
title: The Damselette
description: The Third of the Fatui Harbingers. Behind her innocent appearance lies a power that even Tartaglia fears.

name: Zibai
title: Jade Reflection
description: A wandering scholar of the Guyun Stone Forest, seeking to uncover the ancient memories hidden within Teyvat's rock formations.

name: Illuga
title: Silent Frost Warden
description: A stoic warrior who guards the silver mines of the north. His movements are as precise and unyielding as the stone he commands.

name: Varka
title: Grand Master of the Knights of Favonius
description: The legendary Knight of Boreas and current Grand Master of Mondstadt, currently leading an expedition.

name: Linnea
title: Pink Petal Alchemist
description: A cheerful alchemist from Fontaine known for her unique ability to transmute minerals into beautiful, crystalline flowers.
